scenarios.title: counts paragraph elements inside the my-iframe iframe @positive
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the iframes test page, locate the my-iframe iframe, and assert it contains exactly 20 paragraph elements.
expectedAssertions: iframe my-iframe resolves and is accessible via frameLocator

exactly 20

elements are present inside the iframe (toHaveCount(20))

locatorTable.notes: Selenium string overload matches name OR id; DOM inspection needed to confirm attribute. Fallback: page.frameLocator('#my-iframe') if id is used. See Q1 and Pin 1.

Direct tag-name translation inside the frame context. No accessible ARIA role exists for generic

elements; CSS tag selector is the only viable approach.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: iframe attribute type (name vs id) not confirmed from source alone — Selenium accepts both.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: View page source of https://bonigarcia.dev/selenium-webdriver-java/iframes.html and confirm <iframe name="my-iframe"> vs <iframe id="my-iframe">. If id: switch to page.frameLocator('#my-iframe').
